visual_features.overall_style: Modern, visually bold sports/fitness hero with a cinematic full-bleed background image. Mix of energetic brand blue with high-contrast white typography. Slightly editorial feel due to large serif headline over photography. Overall minimal interface chrome with strong emphasis on imagery and a single CTA.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: 1) Dominant full-bleed rowing photo grabs attention first. 2) Large white serif wordmark/headline 'COZWEAT' placed upper-left over the image establishes the primary message. 3) Secondary text and small waveform-style graphic elements sit beneath the headline as supporting copy. 4) The primary CTA pill button near the lower-left quadrant stands out via high contrast (white pill on darker water) and icon + label. 5) The bright blue top navigation bar is visually strong but thinner in height, acting as a frame rather than the main focal point. 6) The curved blue shape at the bottom anchors the composition and draws attention back toward the brand blue color.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Whitespace is handled mainly as negative space within the photo and through generous padding around text overlays. The hero content (headline, subtext, CTA) is clustered in the left-middle area, leaving the right side of the image relatively open for visual breathing room. The top bar uses ample horizontal spacing between logo, 'APP' label, and right-side icons, avoiding clutter despite multiple navigation elements.
unique_elements: Cinematic full-bleed sports photograph (rowing team) as the primary background with overlaid content
Curved, wave-like blue shape at the bottom of the hero mimicking water and suggesting motion
Audio/graph-style bar visualisation beneath the headline, reinforcing the idea of rhythm or performance metrics
Centered pill-shaped navigation indicator in the top bar that suggests carousel/slide navigation or app sections

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implied 12-column responsive grid with content primarily aligned to a left column cluster while the background image spans full width.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width hero layout with fixed-height top navigation bar, overlaid content on a single dominant background image, and a curved graphic footer edge to transition into subsequent sections.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Currently a single above-the-fold hero section: top navigation bar, then a hero image section with layered text and CTA, culminating in a curved blue bottom edge that likely leads into the next content section below the fold.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left-aligned hero text block anchored roughly at 25–30% from the left edge; navigation items are left-aligned for the logo and right-aligned for menu icons within the top bar. Vertical alignment of the hero content is slightly above center, ensuring the focal rower and text are visible without overlapping too heavily.
responsive_hints: Full-bleed hero image suggests use of background-size: cover with cropping logic for smaller screens.
Top navigation with logo on left and hamburger/menu icon on right indicates adaptability to mobile, where central nav elements could collapse.
Hero text clustered in a single column on the left makes stacking straightforward for narrow viewports (headline → description → CTA).
Pill-shaped central top control could shift to a bottom or centered control on mobile as a slider pagination indicator.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: a full-width fixed-height top bar (logo + nav + icons) followed immediately by a full-screen hero section. Within the hero, content is arranged as a left-aligned vertical stack: large headline at the top of the stack, followed by smaller descriptive text and waveform-like graphics, and finally a primary CTA pill near the bottom of that stack. The right side of the hero is mostly reserved for visual context of the rowing team, maintaining clear separation between content block and imagery.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The hero image consumes nearly the entire viewport height and width. The top navigation bar occupies roughly 10–12% of the vertical space. The textual content and CTA occupy about 25–30% of the width on the left, leaving 70–75% of width for the visual image area. The curved blue bottom shape takes about 8–10% of the height, acting mostly as decorative framing rather than content space.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Relatively spacious hero layout with large typography and generous gaps between line elements. Only a few primary elements are present: brand/name, one block of supporting content, and one CTA. The design favors impact over dense information, appropriate for a landing screen meant to introduce the app.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The eye follows a slight Z-pattern: starting at the top-left logo in the bright blue nav bar, moving horizontally to the right toward the app/menu icons, then dropping diagonally down to the large 'COZWEAT' headline. From there, it moves downward through the waveform/description text to the prominent CTA pill button and finally follows the boat perspective lines toward the vanishing point under the bridge. The curved blue footer shape then directs attention back up and toward subsequent content below the fold.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary CTA appears as a pill-shaped button with fully rounded ends (approx. 24–28px border-radius), white fill, and likely subtle shadow or strong contrast against the darker water. Text is a medium-weight sans-serif in brand blue, with a small icon on the left (likely a glyph representing the app or menu). Padding appears generous (approx. 14–16px vertical, 28–32px horizontal). The button has a clean, flat style without gradients, relying on solid color and shape for prominence.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected as a semantic .

ui_patterns.visual_description: No traditional card components are visible in this specific frame. However, the overlaid hero text block acts like a soft card region: content layered over the image without a distinct border or background, relying on contrast and placement. Future cards would likely use subtle rounding (4–8px), light drop shadows, and full-width or grid-aligned blocks with strong blue accents.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit forms are shown. Based on the visual language, forms would likely use full-width input fields with slightly rounded corners (4–8px radius), light grey or white backgrounds, and thin 1px borders in a soft grey that turn to brand blue on focus. Labels would probably sit above inputs for clarity, with medium line spacing and left alignment. Error states would use red borders and small helper text below the field.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Stacked vertical form layout: <form> with each field in a <div class='form-field'> containing <label> above an <input> or <select>. Validation messages in <small class='field-error'> beneath the input. Form submit as a primary pill-shaped button consistent with CTA styling.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Top navigation is a full-width horizontal bar in bright brand blue. Left side: logo mark plus 'COZWEAT' text, possibly within a darker rectangular patch or logo container. Inline with it is the 'APP' label. Center: a pill-shaped white/navy control with several vertical bars, likely indicating section or mode navigation (like a slider pagination or view toggle). Right side: icon-based controls (possibly list/grid icons and a hamburger menu) in white, evenly spaced. Active states likely indicated via higher contrast (white pill on blue), bold text, and possibly small underline or bar indicators.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit list UI is presented. Given the visual direction, lists (e.g., workout sessions or classes) would likely appear as vertically stacked rows with clear separation via spacing rather than heavy dividers. Each item might combine an icon or thumbnail on the left, bold title text, and lighter metadata text below or to the right. Minimal border use, perhaps thin 1px separators or subtle shadows if list items behave like tappable cards.

heading.visual_style: Elegant high-contrast serif with thin hairlines and pronounced stroke contrast, giving a premium, editorial feel to the large 'COZWEAT' headline.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral sans-serif likely used for navigation, buttons, and smaller descriptive text, balancing the decorative serif headline. Moderate x-height and good legibility.

spacing_system.component_padding: Hero text block uses approximately 24–32px padding from the left screen edge and vertical spacing of 16–24px between headline, subtext, and CTA. Buttons use around 14–16px vertical and 28–32px horizontal padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (e.g., hero and following sections) is likely 64–96px, visually suggested by the substantial curved blue band that separates the hero from subsequent content.

interaction_hints: Buttons likely have hover states where the background color inverts (blue-on-white to white-on-blue) or darkens slightly, with a subtle shadow increase.
Navigation icons in the top bar may show hover via opacity changes or color shifts (white to slightly tinted blue) and possibly small scale/brightness transitions.

The central pill navigation controller may be clickable to change between app views or slides; active state indicated by stronger fill color or highlighted segment, with smooth horizontal sliding animation.
Hero CTA and nav elements would benefit from short (150–250ms) ease-out transitions on hover and focus for background-color, transform (1–2px lift), and shadow.
Micro-interactions could include a gentle parallax effect on the hero background image when scrolling or mouse moving, reinforcing the immersive, cinematic feel.
